problem id: d1ecdd11
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5) AND SHL(1)

examples:
  00011011 -> 00100010
  11000111 -> 10001000
  01110110 -> 11001100
  01101111 -> 11001100
  00111001 -> 00100010
  10001111 -> 00010000
  11101110 -> 11011100
  11001001 -> 00010000
  11111110 -> 11011100

query: 01100111
predicted answer: 11001100
